title: Scaffold engine db mutation modules
goal: Create crates/engine/src/{db,db_index,db_query,db_symbols,db_refactor,db_deploy}.rs and wire lib.rs exports without bypassing catalog seams
completion_gate: engine compiles with new db modules exported from lib.rs
rollback_plan: git restore + envctl catalog sync --dry-run (fail-closed; exports write new trees)
notes: Build into existing catalog seams (catalog.rs read-only snapshot); no CLI-only behavior.

title: Multi-root target model (META_ROOT + LIFE_OS_ROOT)
goal: Implement EnvRootKind/EnvRootRole/EnvRootRow, hold observed/declared/release-target roots + aliases simultaneously, normalize LIFEOS_ROOT->LIFE_OS_ROOT, add catalog root rows, update CLI help to Meta/LifeOS release-target manager
completion_gate: envctl db roots --json lists META_ROOT(observed) + LIFE_OS_ROOT(release-target) with aliases
rollback_plan: git restore + envctl catalog sync --dry-run (fail-closed; exports write new trees)
notes: No blind $META_ROOT rewrite: target-root indirection + alias resolution.

title: Scalable file index (DbFileRow)
goal: Index repo/control-plane files via ignore::WalkBuilder respecting gitignore, targetable to narrow dirs; DbFileRow with content_hash, mutable_policy, protected/generated flags
completion_gate: envctl db scan --repo-root $META_ROOT --json returns DbFileRow set; narrow --scope honored
rollback_plan: git restore + envctl catalog sync --dry-run (fail-closed; exports write new trees)
notes: Do not scan giant unrelated dirs by default; respect .gitignore.

title: Symbol + occurrence index (DbSymbolRow/DbOccurrenceRow)
goal: Index env-vars, path-tokens, Rust items (syn), CLI subcommands, hook/wrapper scripts, config keys as DbSymbolRow with DbOccurrenceRow replace_candidate/replace_policy
completion_gate: envctl db symbols --kind env-var --name META_ROOT --json returns occurrences with byte spans
rollback_plan: git restore + envctl catalog sync --dry-run (fail-closed; exports write new trees)
notes: syn for Rust symbols in-core; ast-grep/tree-sitter only as external managed components (no-C gate).

title: Deterministic query surface + presets
goal: Minimal query language: table selection (files/symbols/occurrences/roots/refs/actions), filters (== contains in matches), agent presets (root:meta, root:lifeos, hooks:codex, wrappers:broken, mutable:unsafe, paths:legacy), --explain, --json
completion_gate: envctl db query --preset paths:legacy --json + --explain reports tables/filters used
rollback_plan: git restore + envctl catalog sync --dry-run (fail-closed; exports write new trees)
notes: No SQL clone; deterministic sort order.

title: Root-alias refactor planner (plan/render/apply)
goal: envctl db map-root/refactor root-alias --from META_ROOT --to LIFE_OS_ROOT: build indexed snapshot, resolve token forms, emit similar-diff preview, --render-out new tree (never in place), --apply requires --confirm + approval
completion_gate: refactor --plan emits diff; --render-out writes NEW tree; --apply refuses without --confirm+approval
rollback_plan: git restore + envctl catalog sync --dry-run (fail-closed; exports write new trees)
notes: R3: default dry-run; backup-before-clobber; atomic temp+rename; marker-block ownership only.

title: Safe hook/deploy automation (plan/apply)
goal: envctl db deploy hooks --target $LIFE_OS_ROOT --plan/--apply: install through envctl managed component system, detect running wrappers/hooks and queue/refuse unsafe overwrites, atomic promotion + rollback
completion_gate: deploy --plan previews; --apply never overwrites an executing script without staged atomic promotion
rollback_plan: git restore + envctl catalog sync --dry-run (fail-closed; exports write new trees)
notes: No process disturbance; no user-global installs; fail-closed.

title: Incremental index invalidation (watch)
goal: envctl db watch --repo-root: notify-based incremental index invalidation with poll fallback and inotify-limit awareness
completion_gate: watch invalidates only changed file rows; poll fallback documented
rollback_plan: git restore + envctl catalog sync --dry-run (fail-closed; exports write new trees)
notes: Optional/poll fallback where useful; large-dir/inotify limits handled.

title: Stable agent --json contract
goal: Every db query/symbol/root/refactor/deploy command emits stable, documented --json; snapshot-tested machine output
completion_gate: json output snapshot-stable across the db command surface
rollback_plan: git restore + envctl catalog sync --dry-run (fail-closed; exports write new trees)
notes: Agent-first: machine output is the primary contract.

title: CLI + GUI share engine APIs
goal: Ensure db query/refactor/deploy behavior lives in envctl-engine and both crates/cli and crates/gui call the same engine APIs (no cli/main.rs-only logic)
completion_gate: GUI and CLI exercise identical engine entry points in tests
rollback_plan: git restore + envctl catalog sync --dry-run (fail-closed; exports write new trees)
notes: Constraint #7: no behavior only in cli/src/main.rs.

title: No-C gates + fmt/test/CI
goal: Run cargo fmt, cargo test, and repo no-C/audit gates (ci/gates/no-c.sh); componentize or feature-gate any C-introducing crate (ast-grep/tree-sitter/libsql-local)
verification_command: cargo fmt --check && cargo test --workspace && bash ci/gates/no-c.sh
completion_gate: fmt clean, tests pass, no-C gate holds (no new C in trust boundary)
rollback_plan: git restore + envctl catalog sync --dry-run (fail-closed; exports write new trees)

title: nu_plugin visuals for db query/refactor/deploy
goal: Add Nushell plugin commands to render envctl db query/roots/symbols results and drive refactor/deploy plan+approval as Nushell-native tables; plugin stays a control/visual surface, envctl DB remains source of truth
completion_gate: plugin renders db query/roots tables and routes refactor/deploy approvals through envctl boundary (no plugin-owned state)
rollback_plan: git restore + envctl catalog sync --dry-run (fail-closed; exports write new trees)
notes: Boundary rule: plugin calls envctl JSON CLI/API; every mutating command appends an envctl event.
